title: Yevel 3 (Joke)
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE: Yevel 3: "The Finale"}} {{Joke}}
[[File:Yevel3.jpg|right|200px|link=]] OGominho to drop last Yerooms level ---- * Joke page series writer plans to crown the level trifecta within a year of its initial release. His trusted archivist compiled the details of the third "Yevel". MEANWHILE... [[File:Yevel3Ye.jpg|right|145px|link=]] Ye calls Vini mdfk 'exceedingly annoying' after recent interview === '''[https://bully.yeezy.com Ye drops Bully after 2 years He Drop it]''' === ---- * Former "The Yerooms" star made inflammatory remarks about Vini in a podcast. He also sided with Coolcolapple and admitted being banned in the Backrooms Fandom by vandalizing pages.
[[File:BULLY YE.jpg|frameless|127x127px]]
{{Quote|That's enough Mr. West, please, no more today |Dake, about Ye's Backrooms Fandom opinions}}
All jokes aside: That's it. This is the end of the Yerooms. This page was supposed to have a good, well-documented joke level, but someone couldn't keep their mouth shut and had to ruin everything; or better, we just got to know who they truly were. I wish I could end this series in a better way, with actual content, but I can't. Some things can't be tolerated. Maybe I'll write another joke page in the future to compensate for this one, or another "_rooms" journey, but for now, just so that you don't leave this page empty handed, here's a Dake photo. [[File:Dake.png|center|300px|link=]]




oh sh!t, new kanye leak that's why kanye the GOAT no 🧢

— The Yerooms explorer to document it, former Ye supporter (before forgiving him again)
